tasks.title: Extract session-validation helper from auth middleware
tasks.what: Pull the session-token verification logic out of AuthMiddleware.__call__ into a new module-level function validate_session(token: str) -> Session. Update AuthMiddleware to call the helper.
agentValidations: validate_session is defined at module scope in src/auth/middleware.py
AuthMiddleware.__call__ delegates token validation to validate_session
AuthMiddleware.__call__ signature (parameter names, types, order) is unchanged
AuthMiddleware.__call__ return type is unchanged (still Response)
No new exception types are raised by AuthMiddleware.__call__ or validate_session

tasks.title: Write tests for validate_session helper
tasks.what: Add unit tests in tests/auth/test_middleware.py covering: valid token, expired token, malformed token, missing token. Mock the session store boundary.
agentValidations: Test file follows project test conventions
At least 4 test cases covering happy path, expired, malformed, and missing token

tasks.title: Document validate_session in module-level docstring
tasks.what: Update the module docstring in src/auth/middleware.py to describe the validate_session helper and link to it from the AuthMiddleware class docstring. No behavior change.
agentValidations: Module docstring lists validate_session under the public API
AuthMiddleware class docstring cross-references the helper
